title: oxypolis rigidior var. longifolia
intro: Oxypolis rigidior var. longifolia, also known as water celery or wild celery, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the carrot family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Oxypolis rigidior var. longifolia can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a treatment for various ailments.
